name: Adventure Of Baldero I and II
short_description: Lord Marn is releasing Abominations in the area where Baldero, our bold and bald hero, took a nap to rest up. The Goddess of mercy, Myla, enters Baldero's dreams to warn him of the up-coming battles. There are many foes to fight before Baldero can stop Marn, will you help him?
detailed_description:
Play as the hero Baldero and stop Lord Marn from destroying parts of Ervenfell. Defeat many immortal Abominations and prevent Marn from releasing them again.

Adventure of Baldero 1
10 Levels, 3 hearts, 1 hero. A short game that served as the basis for Adventure of Baldero 2.

Adventure of Baldero 2
14 Abominations, 13 Spells, 3 passives, 7 difficulties and much more. Consuming all of your magic takes your life points away. Upgrades can be purchased at the market within Larian Village. The adventurer's guild offers more content and opportunity to earn silver coins.



Lord Marn is releasing Abominations in the area where Baldero, our bold and bald hero, took a nap to rest up. The Goddess of mercy, Myla, enters Baldero's dreams to warn him of the up-coming battles. There are many foes to fight before Baldero can stop Marn, will you help him?

A retro action adventure platformer.
Mostly inspired by Megaman 4 on the Gameboy, but has elements of other classics.
This is part of the Ervenfell and Eramirth Universe.
